headline: Xcel Energy Named One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies® for Seventh Consecutive Year
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 18, 2026--For the seventh year in a row, Xcel Energy has been named a World’s Most Ethical Companies® honoree by Ethisphere.
